seoDescription: Dr. Norman Chau, DDS — friendly, gentle general dentistry on Cleveland Avenue in Santa Rosa. English and Spanish spoken; Medi-Cal accepted.
heroSubheading: Dr. Norman Chau, DDS provides friendly, gentle general dental care on Cleveland Avenue, with a welcoming team patients trust.
aboutBody: Dr. Norman Chau is a general dentist serving Santa Rosa from his office on Cleveland Avenue. A graduate of the LSU School of Dentistry, he has built a long-standing reputation in the community for treating patients with patience and care.

Patients consistently describe their visits as professional, friendly, and pain-free. The office is known for being clean and comfortable, with a staff that is welcoming and helpful — including with young children and nervous patients.
Dr. Chau and his team see both English- and Spanish-speaking patients and accept Medi-Cal, making everyday dental care accessible to families across Santa Rosa.

services.title: Exams & Cleanings
services.description: Regular checkups and professional cleanings to keep your smile healthy and catch issues early.

services.title: Fillings & Cavity Care
services.description: Treatment of cavities and repair or replacement of fillings for lasting comfort.

services.title: General Family Dentistry
services.description: Everyday dental care for patients of all ages, including gentle treatment for children.

testimonials.quote: This was probably the first time in my life I was truly at ease with a dentist. Dr. Chau was professional, friendly, knowledgeable, patient, and best of all pain-free.
testimonials.author: Cynthia C.

notes: Solo practice, no website. No reliable Google rating (Healthgrades 4.4/7) → omitted. Confirm new-patient status (sources conflict) + present Medi-Cal factually. Phone (707) 544-4818, 2921 Cleveland Ave. No photos found.
